_doc: UA_KG_UPGRADE U3 — explicit coverage map: which goal-state journey(s) SPECIFICALLY exercise each domain-graph business flow. Used by scripts/kg-review-radar.ts to flag a diff that touches a mapped flow with no covering journey. Deliberately CONSERVATIVE: only specific pairs are listed; a flow that is merely incidentally touched by a broad journey is left UNMAPPED so it surfaces as a real coverage gap (advisory — a human adds a mapping when a journey genuinely covers it). Journey IDs must match apps/dentalemon/scripts/run-journey-harness.ts. Keep this in sync when adding journeys or renaming flows.

_knownUncovered._doc: Flows with no specific goal-state journey today (real coverage gaps the radar will flag when touched). Listed for visibility, not consumed by the script.

_subGaps._doc: Flows that ARE journey-covered overall but have a specific UNcovered step (the coverage map is flow-level, so it can't express this — recorded here so the partial coverage isn't mistaken for full).
_subGaps.flow:cephalometric-analysis: Landmarks→analysis→report are covered by B02/B03/B04 (gate by B01), but the 'Superimpose tracings' step (cephSuperimposition.ts + FE comparison-view.tsx) has NO journey.
